capabilities.capability: Load Cardigann YAML definitions into runtime factory
capabilities.notes: DefinitionLoader and IndexerFactory are fully implemented. main.ts passes empty array to factory constructor.

capabilities.capability: Create, read, update, delete indexers with encrypted settings
capabilities.notes: Full CRUD with settings encryption/decryption. Works for Torznab indexers.

capabilities.capability: Test indexer connectivity with diagnostic hints
capabilities.notes: Test endpoint works for Torznab. Cardigann test fails because factory can't create instance (definitions empty).

capabilities.capability: Definition-driven dynamic form fields for indexer configuration
capabilities.notes: DefinitionLoader parses SettingsField[] from YAML but no API exposes them. Frontend has hardcoded protocol-specific fields.

capabilities.capability: Search indexers for releases (Torznab API and scraping)
capabilities.notes: MediaSearchService calls indexer.search() but no indexer class implements this method. TypeError is caught and returns empty array.

capabilities.capability: Search TV series metadata via SkyHook
capabilities.notes: Direct SkyHook call works but lacks retry, fallback, caching, or structured error classification.

capabilities.capability: Add, list, delete, monitor series
capabilities.notes: Full CRUD with conflict detection, metadata enrichment, monitored toggle.

capabilities.capability: Per-episode monitoring state persistence
capabilities.notes: UI has toggle but state is local-only. No API endpoint for episode monitoring.

capabilities.capability: List missing and cutoff-unmet episodes
capabilities.notes: getMissingEpisodes works. getCutoffUnmetEpisodes is stub (delegates to missing). Uses 'any' types throughout.

capabilities.capability: Automatic file import, rename, and organization on download completion
capabilities.notes: Import manager and organizer exist as tested classes but are not wired into main.ts or torrent completion flow.

capabilities.capability: Search movie metadata via TMDB with proper key management
capabilities.notes: Falls back to 'demo' API key silently. No key validation, no clear error message, no settings UI for key entry.

capabilities.capability: Add, list, delete, monitor movies
capabilities.notes: Full CRUD with conflict detection, metadata enrichment, monitored toggle.

capabilities.capability: Grab a release and add to download queue with activity event
capabilities.notes: Grab works: adds torrent + emits activity event. But torrent manager may be fallback stub (DB-only, no actual download).

capabilities.capability: Queue pause, resume, remove, speed limits
capabilities.notes: Backend endpoints exist and work. Frontend UI is read-only with no action buttons.

capabilities.capability: Application settings management UI
capabilities.notes: Settings page displays one value and save button sends hardcoded payload.

capabilities.capability: Background task scheduler (RSS sync, torrent monitoring, availability checks)
capabilities.notes: Scheduler and service classes exist and are tested. Not instantiated in main.ts.

capabilities.capability: Subtitle search and download via external providers (OpenSubtitles, etc.)
capabilities.notes: Provider is a stub returning empty arrays. SubtitleVariantRepository is thoroughly implemented (450+ lines). Data layer ready, provider layer not.

capabilities.capability: Subtitle management console (inventory, search, download, history)
capabilities.notes: 17-line placeholder page with EmptyPanel message.

capabilities.capability: Dashboard with system metrics, calendar, activity feed
capabilities.notes: Shows 4 metric cards (queue, downloading, seeding, health). Missing: calendar, activity feed, media counts, disk space.

capabilities.capability: Activity log with filtering by type, source, date range
capabilities.notes: Basic paginated log. API supports filters but UI doesn't expose them.
